overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from a survival horror game showing a character standing in tall grass at night, facing a distant twisted tree structure with mountains in the background. The scene features atmospheric fog, dramatic low lighting, and an eerie, exploratory atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty field with twisted tree landmark

agents.ego_description: character stands still in tall grass, facing the distant twisted tree structure, appearing to survey the dark landscape

entered.detail: large gnarled dead tree stump with distinctive twisted shape silhouetted against the sky
dark mountain silhouette forming the horizon backdrop
dense tall grass and wheat surrounding the character in the foreground
leafless twisted tree branches framing the left side of the view
dark pine tree on the right edge of the frame
warm orange glow of campfires or torches visible in the distant village area
wooden stakes or fence posts scattered in the middle distance

segments.scene_description: The character stands motionless in a field of tall grass at night, facing a distinctive twisted tree stump that dominates the center of the horizon. Mist hangs in the air between bare branches and distant mountains, while warm firelight glows from a settlement to the right, creating a tense, atmospheric mood.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a nocturnal wilderness centered on a haunting silhouette. It begins with a character standing motionless in a field of tall grass, facing a distinctive twisted tree stump that dominates the horizon. As the camera lingers, the surrounding mist clings to the bare branches and distant mountains, deepening the sense of isolation. The scene then balances this eerie stillness with a warm glow of firelight emanating from a settlement to the right, grounding the tense environment in a flicker of distant civilization.
